recommendations.title: More Crochet Hacks
recommendations.desc: Your "Crochet Hack- Invisible Round Joint" video got over 2,100 views, so make more short, helpful crochet trick videos for beginners!

recommendations.title: Ask Viewers to Subscribe
recommendations.desc: With over 37,000 total views but only 65 subscribers, remind people watching your popular videos to hit that subscribe button at the end of your tutorials.

recommendations.title: Specific Tool Guides
recommendations.desc: Your "Pfaff Varimatic" video got over 2,600 views; consider making more super specific "how-to" guides for other crafting tools you use.

recommendations.title: Shorten Tutorials
recommendations.desc: Turn parts of your longer crochet tutorials into quick, vertical "Shorts" just like your popular "How To Start #crochet #magicRing" video.

recommendations.title: Share Your World
recommendations.desc: Your "Canadian Winter Life 2" video was very popular, so share more little peeks into your life or what inspires your crafts.

recommendations.title: Beginner-Friendly Thumbnails
recommendations.desc: Make sure your video thumbnails clearly show the finished crochet stitch or project, especially for your top-performing "beginner tutorial" videos.

recommendations.title: Organize Playlists
recommendations.desc: Group your 66 videos into helpful playlists like "Beginner Crochet Tutorials" or "Crochet Hacks" to make it easy for new viewers.

recommendations.title: Reply to Comments
recommendations.desc: Take time to reply to all comments on your videos, especially on popular ones like "How To Start #crochet #magicRing MR," to build your community.

recommendations.title: Celebrate 100 Subscribers
recommendations.desc: Prepare a short "thank you" video or post for when you reach 100 subscribers to show your appreciation and connect with your growing audience.

recommendations.title: Share Your Heritage
recommendations.desc: As a Japanese-Canadian creator, share how your unique background influences your crafts or maybe explore some Japanese-inspired crochet patterns.
